Package jline.lang.nodes

Class Source

  • java.lang.Object
    • jline.lang.Element
      • jline.lang.NetworkElement
        • jline.lang.nodes.Node
          • jline.lang.nodes.StatefulNode
            • jline.lang.nodes.Station
              • jline.lang.nodes.Source
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Serializable, HasSchedStrategy
    public class Source
extends Station
implements HasSchedStrategy, Serializable
    An abstraction of the external world jobs in open classes come from
    See Also:
